title: senecio formosus
intro: Senecio formosus, also known as the Formosa ragwort or Jacobaea formosa, is a plant species within the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and woolly leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to act as a purgative and to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Senecio formosus are attributed to its ability to stimulate the body's natural processes, reduce inflammation, and promote digestive health. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
